title: Create a related record with minimal ceremony
goal: Create a person named Mia and attach her to the existing company Acme.
assumptions: Relation-aware skeem operations are easier for models than raw multi-call API workflows.
Agents can discover the right relation field before writing.
prompt: Create a new person named Mia and associate her with the existing company Acme. Prefer the smallest safe number of steps.
success_checks: Exactly one new person record named Mia exists
Mia is related to Acme correctly
failure_modes: Writes to the wrong relation field
Skips discovery and guesses the schema
